posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello !
Definitively we are needing some improvements to the line and bar charts :

  • possibility of placing a target value
  • possibility of placing level controls (ULC or LCL).

This is a must have if we need to keep our process under control.

EXAMPLES ULC / LCL
